emails.subject: Aussie ISDAs
emails.body: Aussie ISDAs Tana, Do you need copies of the Australia ISDAs? I just sent copies to the London office and have the copies I kept here in Houston if you need them. Thanks, Jana Morse

emails.subject: Aussie ISDAs
emails.body: Aussie ISDAs Tana, Do you need copies of the Australia ISDAs? I just sent copies to the London office and have the copies I kept here in Houston if you need them. Thanks, Jana Morse

emails.subject: Re: Aussie ISDAs
emails.body: Re: Aussie ISDAs Not wanting to duplicate any efforts, I think Laurie Meyer, a paralegal in Alan Aronowitz's group, is going to send me copies of the Australian ISDA's when they come in. Thanks for the offer! Jana Morse@ENRON 11/20/2000 11:01 AM
